roa.docketEntryComment: Order - Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Terminated
DEF ATC MOT TO MODIFY GPS, FILED
ATC APD MOTION TO MODIFY VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED
DEF OPP TO DA MOTION TO JOIN DEFENDANTS FILEDDEFT MOT FOR BAIL HRG & ORD RELEASE DEF ON OR/BAIL REDUC FILED
DA'S MOTION JOIN DEFENDANTS (W/#19003243); P & A FILED

/CAL:MODIFICATION OF SENTENCE/DAWT/X:SENTENCE IN THIS MATTER WAS PRONOUNCED ON 04-21-20, THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO MODIFICATION OF THE ACTUAL DAYS INCOUNTY JAIL TO ACCOUNT FOR AN ADDITIONAL 84 DAYS PURSUANT TO MILESTONE CREDITS,/X:CONFIRMATION OF THE ADDITIONAL 84 DAYS CREDIT IS PROVIDED BY LEGALSERVICES FOR THE COUNTY JAIL,/OR/X:DEFENDANT TO BE RELEASED TO COUNSEL FOR TRANSPORT TO DELANCY STREET RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAMS,/

/CAL:SENTENCING/AJW/CH1:SP 6Y:U:ESS:PROB 5 Y:PJ 439D/CTS:439/24MREVIEW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/STATES/DEF:SHALL ENTER AND COMPLETE A 2 YEAR RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM THROUGH DELANCY STREET, UPON RELEASE, DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION AND BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR 1 YEAR/DEF:IS ADMONISHED BY THE COURT THAT FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE DELANCY  STREET RESIDENTIALTREATMENT PROGRAM SHALL RESULT IN DEFENDANT SERVING THE REMAINING TIME ON HIS SENTENCE IN STATE PRISON/DEF:SHALL RECEIVE GOOD TIME CREDIT FOR THE FORTHE TIME SPENT IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT SO LONG AS HE COMPLETES THE TWO YEAR PROGRAM/X:SHOULD DEFENDANT NOT COMPLETE THE DELANCY STREET PROGRAM HE SHALL RECEIVE NO CREDIT FOR ANY TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM/IND/WS/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/RESTV/SAORD/SA1:WEI SHU WU/SAORD2/SAORD3/CTORD:FINESAND FEES BE STAYED PERMANENTLY IN THIS MATTER PURSUANT TO DUENAS/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:AS TO COUNTS 2, 5 AND 6, THE TERM SHALL BE ONE-THIRDTHE MIDTERM OF 24 MONTHS OR, 8 MONTHS IN STATE PRISON, EACH SHALL RUN CONSECUTIVE TO THE PREVIOUS, TERMS OF PROBATION FOR COUNTS 2, 5 AND 6 ARE THE SAME AS STATED FOR COUNT 1/

/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFG/DEFT ADV RTS:1, 2, 5 AND 6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PSRW/REMA/SAORD/SA1:WEI SHU WU/SAORD2/SA2:4 CITY BLOCK AREA IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OFSAN FRANCISCO BOUND BY QUINTARA ST, 29TH AVE, SANTIAGO ST AND 31ST AVE,/SAORD3/
/CAL:DISPOSITION/X:BY REPRESENTATION OF DEFENSE COUNSEL, A PD SUPERVISOR IS REQUIRED TO BE PRESENT AT DISPOSITION, THE SUPERVISOR IS UNAVAILABLE,/CONTD:DISPOSITION/DOP/

/CAL:INSTRUCTION, ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA, AND COUNSEL/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S)& DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER/STWPX/987,2/BAIL:600,000/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL FILED/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL SIGNED AND FILED/BAIL:600000/CONTD I&A P&C DOP/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/TWA/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWT/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/DOPU:ATTORNEY HAS AUTHORITY/
/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY GPS/MO GRTD/EMMOD: ELECTRONIC MONITORING TOBE REMOVED ON 05-11-22 AND RE-AFFIXED ON DEFENDANT ON 05-24-22/
/CAL:APD MTR FILING/APD-MTR/WIAMTR/PROB ADM REV/OR/14    GPROGRESS REPORT/PROG:12-09-20/CONTD:TO SET APD MTR & APD PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:IN PROGRAM
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & MOTION TO JOIN CASE 19003243/X:DEPT, 20 CASE/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE & MOTION TO JOIN CASE 19003243/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO JOIN CASE #19003243/CONT/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DEFENSE BAIL MOTION IS DENIED/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND MOTION TO JOIN CASE #19003283/DOP/
